explanatoryNotes: Public matching funds account for about 63% of the campaign's total resources.
15 donors gave at the legal maximum, totaling $15,750.
Committees, unions, or other non-individual donors made up 32% of reported private fundraising.
A noticeable share of reported private fundraising, 34%, came from outside New York City.
Among reported private contributions, real estate stands out as one of the strongest donor patterns.
